rulings.Case Title: JAY MORTON VS. KATHLEEN M BARISH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Motion For Award Of Atty'S Fees; Memo Of P And A; Declaration(S) Of Thomas R Burke, Karl Olson,Steven Abern
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, March 1, 2010, line 4, DEFENDANT KATHLEEN BARISH Motion For Award Of Attorney's Fees. Motion for attorney fees granted, defendant awarded $42,928.20 attorney fees and costs. Hourly rates reasonable. Work performed reasonable and necessary, and counsels' declarations support the award which is based on hours expended times hourly rates. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: REGINALD SMITH VS. FINE LINE CONSTRUCTION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, March 1, 2010, line 7, DEFENDANT FINE LINE CONSTRUCTION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Is sustained, with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ARASH GHANADAN VS. CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, March 1, 2010, line 8, PLAINTIFF ARASH GHANADAN DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the first affirmative defense (failure to state a cause of action) which is an objection, not a defense, and is not waived. CCP section 430.80(a) Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend as to remaining defenses to specify facts that support the defenses. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD PERRILLO VS. JAY WIENER et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, March 1, 2010, line 9, DEFENDANT JAY WIENER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. As to first cause of action for a violation of right to privacy, plaintiffs must allege facts describing the nature and extent of the public disclosure, and a description of the "dossier." As to the second cause of action for intentional infliction of emotional distress, additional facts must be alleged to support the nature and extent of severe emotional distress. =(302/CWW)
